subcodes.first_line: O manifestation of eternal glory! The sovereignty of both worlds lies in service to the friends, particularly to the pilgrims of the Most-Merciful Lord's Sanctuary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر عزت ابدیه سلطنت دو جهان خدمت یارانست علی الخصوص بزائرین کعبه رحمان
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @predictions and prophecies, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
